subject: [PATCH v5 07/21] mm: create scaffolds for the new virtual swap implementation

2026-03-20.patch_summary: This patch adds scaffolding code for the new virtual swap implementation, including a new mm/vswap.c source file and necessary changes to the Makefile and other related files. The vswap debugfs directory is set up, but no behavioral changes are intended at this time. Additionally, Johannes Weiner is added as a reviewer for the virtual swap development.
